remedies.name: manual-base64-decode-fallback
remedies.trigger: Workspace Linux VM unavailable AND a connector returns base64-encoded file content that must be written to disk
remedies.usage: Download via download_file_content, decode the base64 payload in-model, Write the decoded text directly. Only for text/code files; refuse for binaries >~100KB and record manual download links instead. Always flag output as UNVERIFIED pending a compile/lint pass.

remedies.name: missing-sprite-model-enums
remedies.trigger: Building the Chimera sprite system; core-model sprites package missing expression/state enums referenced by ChimeraSprite.kt and SpriteTestFixtures.kt
remedies.usage: Copy both files to core-model/src/main/kotlin/com/chimera/core/model/sprites/. If originals surface in the Drive zip, diff before replacing.
